executionArgs.additionalInstruction: All test cases must navigate to the PRODUCTION Vercel deployment at https://draftr-website.vercel.app — NOT localhost. Use https://draftr-website.vercel.app as the base URL for every page navigation (e.g. https://draftr-website.vercel.app/login, https://draftr-website.vercel.app/shorts, https://draftr-website.vercel.app/chat etc.). Test the full auth flow, all frontend pages, navbar, video feed, shorts library, info panel, like/mute, open-in-tab, and logout against the live Vercel site.
